title: Evangelion 222 release date 03 29 11
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2.22 release date: 03/29/11             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Mon Nov 15, 2010 9:22 pm http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2010-11-15/summer-wars-submitted-for-oscar-nominations (scroll down to the bottom) 2.22 will be released on 3/29/11. And it shall be glorious . Mod note: RELEASE DATE CHANGED: http://www.evageeks.org/2011/01/funimation-evangelion-2-22-release-date-change/ Mod note: RELEASE DATE CHANGED--AGAIN (Back to the 29th!): http://animecornerstore.blogspot.com/2011/01/another-set-of-funimation-date-changes.html

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Mon Nov 15, 2010 10:18 pm Looking at the article that ANN referenced, I decided to check the Funi site. Excluding seeing the same article that ANN referenced reposted on the Funi forums, I found nothing else.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Nov 15, 2010 10:19 pm YAY. No waiting til Nov '11. I hope Funimation has somewhat consistent box designs (artwork was from Kara for Eva-01 1.xx-based stuff) between 1.11 and 2.22. And that DVD 2.22 doesn't have missing extras. (See also: DVD 1.11 versus BD 1.11.) Back to Real Life.

[]: I'm a cool hipster now that people doubt my sources.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Mon Nov 15, 2010 10:20 pm EvangelionFan wrote: Looking at the article that ANN reference, I decided to check the Funi site. Excluding seeing the same article that ANN referenced reposted on the Funi forums, I found nothing else.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Nov 15, 2010 10:33 pm Well hey, 2.0 came out in theaters like three months after 1.11 came out in the US, so that means we can expect Q by July, amirite guise? amirite?

[]:             Quote Post by Naminator » Mon Nov 15, 2010 10:35 pm Yeeeeeaaaaaaaaa! What can I say, Rebuild will be only Blueray DVDs I will ever own. With Avatar being an exception of course, that movie, just like Rebuild should never bee seen on anything less than 1080p. Ohhh and YAY, my PS3 is finally starting to get some use.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Mon Nov 15, 2010 10:48 pm Killer Bee wrote: Rightstuf leaked the information early.

[]: Killer Bee Special Mode: ZA DICKO!             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Mon Nov 15, 2010 10:54 pm EvangelionFan wrote: blahblahblah conspiracy theories

[]:             Quote Post by Nonoriri » Mon Nov 15, 2010 11:00 pm Azathoth wrote: Well hey, 2.0 came out in theaters like three months after 1.11 came out in the US, so that means we can expect Q by July, amirite guise? amirite?

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Nov 15, 2010 11:06 pm News Post Up.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Nov 15, 2010 11:46 pm Why did I read "Evangelion" "release date" but I skipped "2.22" and I wanted to believe that the 3.00 has been announced? Why?

[]:             Quote Post by Naminator » Mon Nov 15, 2010 11:51 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Why did I read "Evangelion" "release date" but I skipped "2.22" and I wanted to believe that the 3.00 has been announced? Why?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Tue Nov 16, 2010 12:18 am I doubt it's coming out in 4 months. We dont even know who's doing Mari,Kaji or Asuka yet not to mention they usually screen 2.0 before. Plus,where did Rightstuff even get this? It's probably a guess they made because Funimation has yet to say anything on this.Dont get your hopes up on this being true.

[]: Your doubt only makes me stronger.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Tue Nov 16, 2010 12:26 am Eva 04 wrote: I doubt it's coming out in 4 months. We dont even know who's doing Mari,Kaji or Asuka yet not to mention they usually screen 2.0 before. Plus,where did Rightstuff even get this? It's probably a guess they made because Funimation has yet to say anything on this.Dont get your hopes up on this being true.

[]: Re: Your doubt only makes me stronger.             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Nov 16, 2010 12:29 am Killer Bee wrote: Sometimes I worry about you guys.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Tue Nov 16, 2010 12:30 am Well,if this is true,then Spring is gonna rock next year.

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Tue Nov 16, 2010 1:16 am If this is true, hells to the yeah!!!! Although they don't seem like they will do a theater release, at least I'll experience it's awesomeness in my home theater. And I will finally be able to check out Summer Wars too.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Tue Nov 16, 2010 6:00 am wow, that's pretty late for you guys. what's taking so long? hopefully, you will get at least some nice bonus features.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue Nov 16, 2010 6:37 am Eva 04 wrote: I doubt it's coming out in 4 months. We dont even know who's doing Mari,Kaji or Asuka yet not to mention they usually screen 2.0 before. Plus,where did Rightstuff even get this? It's probably a guess they made because Funimation has yet to say anything on this.Dont get your hopes up on this being true.

[]:             Quote Post by TonyTH » Tue Nov 16, 2010 6:57 am KnightmareX13 wrote: There was a ANN cast that was discussed here on the forums somewhere(can't seem to find it now) and they had a Funi employe on an he said that the Evangelion 2.22 project was on a "fast track", so it could be possible.
